# Itaju Residency

> Paraguayan temporary residency for global citizens, convertible to permanent after 2 years. One flat fee, lawyer led, locally handled. Asunción, Paraguay.

Itaju Residency helps international clients obtain Paraguayan temporary residency, which can be converted to permanent residency after 2 years. Service is lawyer led, registered as Itaju Group E.A.S. in Asunción, Paraguay. One flat fee, one 14 day trip, all paperwork handled by the team and partner law firm.

## Service

- One flat fee: USD 2,500
- Temporary residency, convertible to permanent after 2 years
- One 14 day trip to Paraguay required
- All paperwork managed end to end
- English and Spanish language support

## What is included

- Paraguayan ID (Cédula)
- Tax Registration (RUC, if required)
- Police Clearance
- Lawyer Representation (Legal Requirement)
- Paperwork Handled
- Path to Permanent Residency after 2 years
- Single trip, fully handled

  - [Does Paraguay Residency Make You a Tax Resident?](https://itajuresidency.com/blog/paraguay-residency-vs-tax-residency)

## Company

- Brand: Itaju Residency
- Parent: Itaju Group E.A.S.
- Location: Asunción, Paraguay
- Country: Paraguay (PY)
- Languages: English, Spanish
